info.title: Records
info.description: The Zoho CRM Records API allows you to perform CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations on records across all modules in your CRM. Use this API to retrieve, create, update, delete, upsert, and clone records.

get.description: To get the list of available records from a module
get.summary: Get Records for a specific module

200.description: Successful response containing the list of records for the specified module

204.description: No Content - The request was successful, but no records found.

400.description: Bad Request - The request could not be processed due to invalid input, missing mandatory parameters

403.description: Forbidden - User lacks permission to access the requested module, Records or This API is supported only for admin users.

404.description: Not Found - The requested URL pattern is invalid or the specified resource does not exist.

post.summary: Create a Record in a specific module
post.description: Create a Record in a specific module

schema.description: The request body for Records Post

400.description: Bad Request - The request could not be processed due to invalid input, missing mandatory parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication failed or insufficient OAuth scope permissions.

403.description: Forbidden - User lacks permission add records to the requested module, Records or This API is supported only for admin users.

404.description: Not Found - The requested URL pattern is invalid or the specified resource does not exist.

put.description: To update existing entities or records in a specified module.
put.summary: To update existing entities or records in a specified module

schema.description: Request body containing the updated resource data to modify the existing record.

200.description: Success Response containing the record id

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication failed or insufficient OAuth scope permissions.

403.description: Forbidden - User lacks permission update records in the requested module, Records or This API is supported only for admin users.

404.description: Not Found - The requested URL pattern is invalid or the specified resource does not exist.

412.description: The record was modified after the time specified.

schema.description: Root response object returned when a record update fails due to concurrent modification.

data.description: List of error objects describing why the request failed.

items.description: Error object representing a single record modification conflict.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating the type of failure.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the error.

status.description: Overall execution status of the request.

details.description: Additional metadata describing the record state at the time of conflict.

Modified_Time.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was last modified.

Created_Time.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was originally created.

id.description: Unique identifier of the record that caused the conflict.

Modified_By.description: User who last modified the record.

name.description: Display name of the modifying user.

id.description: Unique identifier of the modifying user.

Created_By.description: User who originally created the record.

name.description: Display name of the creating user.

id.description: Unique identifier of the creating user.

delete.summary: Delete multiple records from a module
delete.description: Permanently deletes one or more records from the specified module using comma-separated record IDs. Returns per-item results for bulk operations.

200.description: Successful deletion. Returns a success status for each deleted record.

schema.description: Response schema returned when one or more records are successfully deleted.

data.description: List of successfully deleted records with individual success details.

items.description: Success object representing a single deleted record.

code.description: Machine-readable code indicating successful deletion.

details.description: Additional metadata related to the deleted record.

id.description: Unique identifier of the record that was deleted.

message.description: Human-readable confirmation message for the deletion.

status.description: Overall execution status of the delete operation for the record.

207.description: Multi-status response indicating that some records were deleted successfully while others failed.

schema.description: Response returned when a bulk delete operation results in mixed success and failure outcomes.

data.description: List of per-record results indicating whether each record deletion succeeded or failed.

status.description: Indicates that the delete operation for the record was successful.

code.description: Success code returned for a deleted record.

message.description: Message confirming successful deletion of the record.

details.description: Additional information about the deleted record.

id.description: Unique identifier of the deleted record.

status.description: Indicates that the delete operation for the record failed.

code.description: Error code describing why the record could not be deleted.

message.description: Message explaining the reason for the deletion failure.

details.description: Additional context about the deletion error.

api_name.description: API name associated with the error.

id.description: Identifier of the record that failed to delete.

param.description: Request parameter that caused the error.

param_name.description: Name of the invalid or missing parameter.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid module, missing parameters, or invalid record IDs.

oneOf.description: Response schema returned when one or more records fail to delete due to invalid data in a bulk delete operation.

data.description: List of error objects for each record that failed to delete.

items.description: Error object representing a single record deletion failure.

code.description: Error code indicating lack of delete permission.

message.description: Message explaining why the delete operation is forbidden.

status.description: Status indicating the failure of the request.

details.description: Details indicating the failure of the request.

id.description: Failed ID

oneOf.description: Response schema returned when a record fails to delete due to various errors.

status.description: Overall execution status of the request.

code.description: Error code indicating the reason for deletion failure.

message.description: Human-readable message describing the error encountered during deletion.

details.description: Additional context about the deletion error.

api_name.description: API name associated with the error.

id.description: Identifier of the record that failed to delete.

param.description: Request parameter that caused the error.

param_name.description: Name of the invalid or missing parameter.

401.description: Unauthorized response returned when the OAuth token does not contain the required delete scope.

schema.description: Error response indicating an OAuth scope mismatch.

code.description: Error code representing the reason for authorization failure.

message.description: Human-readable message describing the authorization error.

status.description: Status indicating the result of the API request.

schema.description: Error response indicating insufficient privileges to perform delete operation.

code.description: Error code indicating lack of delete permission.

message.description: Message explaining why the delete operation is forbidden.

status.description: Status indicating the failure of the request.

404.description: Response returned when the API endpoint URL is invalid or the requested resource does not exist.

schema.description: Error response indicating an invalid URL pattern or missing resource.

code.description: Error code indicating an invalid URL or resource path.

message.description: Message describing the invalid URL or missing resource.

status.description: Status indicating request failure.

500.description: Response returned when an unexpected internal server error occurs during record deletion.

schema.description: Error response indicating an internal server failure.

code.description: Error code representing an internal server error.

message.description: Message describing the internal server error.

status.description: Status indicating request failure due to server error.

delete.summary: Delete a single record by ID
delete.description: Permanently deletes a specific record from the module using its unique record ID.

200.description: Successful response returned when the specified record is deleted.

schema.description: Response schema returned after successfully deleting a record by ID.

data.description: List containing the result of the delete operation for the requested record.

items.description: Success object representing a deleted record.

code.description: Machine-readable success code indicating the record was deleted.

message.description: Human-readable confirmation message for the delete operation.

status.description: Indicates the operation completed successfully.

details.description: Additional information about the deleted record.

id.description: Unique identifier of the deleted record.

400.description: Bad request response returned when record deletion fails due to invalid input, path parameters, or request constraints.

schema.description: Error response schema returned for client-side errors encountered during delete-by-ID operations.

code.description: Machine-readable error code identifying the reason the delete request failed.

message.description: Human-readable explanation describing why the delete request failed.

details.description: Additional contextual information related to the error.

resource_path_index.description: Index of the resource in the request path where the error occurred.

id.description: Identifier of the record related to the error.

param.description: Name of the parameter that caused the error.

status.description: Indicates that the delete operation resulted in an error.

401.description: Response returned when the request is unauthorized due to a missing or invalid OAuth scope required for record deletion.

schema.description: Error response schema returned when OAuth scope validation fails for delete-by-ID operations.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating an OAuth scope mismatch.

message.description: Human-readable message indicating the request is unauthorized.

status.description: Indicates the operation resulted in an authorization error.

schema.description: Error response schema returned when record deletion is blocked due to insufficient permissions.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating permission denial.

message.description: Human-readable explanation indicating the user lacks delete permission.

status.description: Indicates the operation resulted in an error.

message.description: Human-readable explanation indicating the URL is incorrect or unsupported.

status.description: Indicates the operation resulted in an error.

500.description: Internal server error response returned when record deletion fails due to an unexpected server-side issue.

post.summary: To insert a new or update an existing record based on duplicate check field
post.description: The Upsert API allows you to insert a new record or update an existing one based on duplicate check field values.

schema.description: Request body schema for upsert operations, allowing creation or update of records based on duplicate fields.

data.description: List of records to be created or updated using the upsert operation.

items.description: Single record payload containing field-value pairs for upsert.

id.description: Unique identifier of the record. If null or omitted, a new record may be created.

trigger.description: List of automation triggers to be executed during the upsert operation.

items.description: Name of the trigger to be executed.

duplicate_check_fields.description: Defines the ordered list of fields used to detect duplicate records during upsert.

items.description: API name of the field used for duplicate record verification.

wf_trigger.description: Workflow trigger identifier to be executed as part of the upsert operation.

lar_id.description: Layout assignment rule identifier used to determine record layout during upsert.

get.summary: Get deleted records from a module
get.description: Retrieve the deleted records for the module. This endpoint can retrieve both permanently deleted records and temporarily deleted records from the recycle bin.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Specifies the type of deleted records to retrieve. Use 'all' to get all deleted records, 'recycle' for records in recycle bin, or 'permanent' for permanently deleted records.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: To get the list of records from the respective pages. Default value for page is 1.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: To get the list of records available per page. The default and the maximum possible value is 200.

200.description: Successful response containing the list of deleted records.

schema.description: Response schema returned when deleted records are successfully retrieved.

data.description: List of deleted records with their metadata.

items.description: Deleted record object containing information about a single deleted record.

id.description: Unique identifier of the deleted record.

display_name.description: Display name of the deleted record. Null for permanently deleted records.

type.description: Type of deletion - 'recycle' for records in recycle bin, 'permanent' for permanently deleted records.

deleted_time.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was deleted.

deleted_by.description: User who deleted the record. Null for permanently deleted records.

name.description: Display name of the user who deleted the record.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user who deleted the record.

created_by.description: User who originally created the record. Null for permanently deleted records.

name.description: Display name of the user who created the record.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the record.

info.description: Pagination information for the deleted records response.

count.description: Number of records returned in the current response.

more_records.description: Indicates whether more records are available beyond the current page.

If-Modified-Since.description: Use this header to get the list of recently modified records.

schema.description: Timestamp in RFC 3339 format.

204.description: No Content - The request was successful, but no deleted records found.

400.description: Bad Request - The request could not be processed due to invalid input or missing mandatory parameters.

schema.description: Error response schema for deleted records endpoint.

code.description: Machine-readable error code identifying the type of failure.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the error.

status.description: Indicates the request resulted in an error.

details.description: Additional contextual information about the error.

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication failed or insufficient OAuth scope permissions.

schema.description: Error response schema for unauthorized access to deleted records.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating OAuth scope mismatch.

message.description: Human-readable message indicating the request is unauthorized.

status.description: Indicates the operation resulted in an authorization error.

404.description: Not Found - The requested URL pattern is invalid or the specified resource does not exist.

schema.description: Error response schema for invalid URL patterns in deleted records endpoint.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating an invalid API endpoint URL.

message.description: Human-readable explanation indicating the URL is incorrect or unsupported.

status.description: Indicates the operation resulted in an error.

post.summary: To clone a record in a module
post.description: To clone a record in a module.

schema.description: By default, when you clone a record, the field values of the parent record will also be copied to the cloned record. If you want to modify certain fields or to add value to some fields, specify their field API names and their corresponding values in the input body.

400.description: Bad Request - The request could not be processed due to invalid input, missing mandatory parameters

401.description: Unauthorized - Authentication failed or insufficient OAuth scope permissions."

403.description: Forbidden - User lacks permission to add records in  the requested module, Records or This API is supported only for admin users.

404.description: Not Found - The requested URL pattern is invalid or the specified resource does not exist.

Fields.name: fields
Fields.description: Specify the API names of the fields you want to retrieve when fetching the records.

Record.name: recordID
Record.description: This ID is used to uniquely identify a record

TerritoryId.name: territory_id
TerritoryId.description: Specify the territory ID to get the list of records that belongs to a specific territory

Ids.name: ids
Ids.description: To retrieve specific records based on their unique ID.

Cvid.name: cvid
Cvid.description: Specify the custom view ID to get the list of records based on custom views

PerPage.name: per_page
PerPage.description: Specify how many records to return per page

Page.name: page
Page.description: To get the list of records from the respective pages

PageToken.name: page_token
PageToken.description: To fetch more than 2000 records, you must include the "page_token" param in the request

SortOrder.name: sort_order
SortOrder.description: To sort the available list of records in either ascending or descending order

SortBy.name: sort_by
SortBy.description: To sort the records based on the fields id, Created_Time, and Modified_Time. The default value is 'id'

Converted.name: converted
Converted.description: To get the list of converted records

IncludeChild.name: include_child
IncludeChild.description: To include records from the child territories

RecordsInputSchema.description: Input schema for create, update, or upsert record requests.

data.description: Request body containing one or more records to be created or updated.

items.description: Payload representing a single record to be created or updated.

id.description: Unique identifier of the record. Required when modifying an existing record.

$append_values.description: Controls whether values in a multi-select picklist field should be appended or replaced during an update operation.

apply_feature_execution.description: List of features that should be executed on demand during record processing.

items.description: Feature execution configuration object.

skip_feature_execution.description: List of features that should be skipped during record processing.

items.description: Feature skip configuration object.

trigger.description: List of automation triggers to invoke during the record operation.

items.description: Type of automation trigger to be executed.

RecordsErrorResponse.description: Standard error response schema returned when one or more record operations fail.

data.description: List of error objects describing individual record-level failures.

items.description: Error object representing a failure encountered while processing a record.

code.description: Machine-readable error code identifying the reason for the failure.

details.description: Additional details associated with the error.

resource_path_index.description: Position of the record in the request payload where the error occurred.

api_name.description: The API name of the field associated with the error.

json_path.description: JSONPath pointer to the field that caused the error.

expected_fields.description: Used specifically when the error code is EXPECTED_FIELD_MISSING.

items.description: Additional information on the missing fields

api_name.description: Name of the missing expected field.

json_path.description: JSONPath location of the expected field.

message.description: Human-readable explanation of the error.

status.description: Indicates the outcome of the operation for the record.

RecordSuccessResponse.description: Standard success response schema for single or bulk record operations.

data.description: List of successfully processed records with detailed metadata.

items.description: Success object representing a single successfully processed record.

code.description: Machine-readable code indicating a successful operation.

message.description: Human-readable success message describing the operation outcome.

status.description: Overall execution status of the operation.

details.description: Detailed metadata about the processed record.

id.description: Unique identifier of the record.

Modified_Time.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was last modified.

Created_Time.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was created.

Created_By.description: User who originally created the record.

name.description: Display name of the creating user.

id.description: Unique identifier of the creating user.

Modified_By.description: User who last modified the record.

name.description: Display name of the modifying user.

id.description: Unique identifier of the modifying user.

$approval_state.description: Approval state of the record in the approval workflow.

RecordUnathorizedResponse.description: Response schema returned when a request is unauthorized due to OAuth scope mismatches.

data.description: List of error objects indicating that the request is not authorized.

items.description: Error object representing an OAuth scope mismatch.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating an OAuth scope mismatch.

message.description: Human-readable explanation describing why the OAuth token is unauthorized.

status.description: Overall execution status of the request.

RecordInternalErrorResponse.description: Schema for internal server error responses related to record operations.

data.description: List of error objects describing internal server failures.

items.description: Error object representing an unexpected internal server error.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating an internal server failure.

message.description: Human-readable description of the internal server error.

status.description: Overall execution status of the request.

RecordPermissionResponse.description: Response schema returned when a user lacks the necessary permissions to perform a record operation.

data.description: List of error objects indicating insufficient user permissions.

items.description: Error object representing a permission denial.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating the user does not have permission.

message.description: Human-readable explanation describing the permission denial.

status.description: Overall execution status of the request.

RecordInvalidURLResponse.description: Response schema returned when the requested API endpoint URL pattern is invalid or unsupported.

data.description: List of error objects indicating an invalid or unsupported API endpoint URL.

items.description: Error object representing an invalid API URL pattern.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating an invalid endpoint URL pattern.

message.description: Human-readable explanation describing why the requested URL is invalid.

status.description: Overall execution status of the request.

RecordGETSucessResponse.description: Successful response schema returned for GET record or GET records API operations.

data.description: List of records retrieved from the module.

items.description: Represents a single record. This object may include both standard and custom fields.

id.description: Unique identifier of the record.

Owner.description: Details of the user who owns the record.

id.description: Unique identifier of the record owner.

email.description: Email address of the record owner.

Created_Time.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was created.

Modified_Time.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was last modified.

Created_By.description: Details of the user who created the record.

name.description: Name of the user who created the record.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user who created the record.

Modified_By.description: Details of the user who last modified the record.

name.description: Name of the user who last modified the record.

id.description: Unique identifier of the user who last modified the record.

info.description: Pagination and metadata information for the GET records response.

call.description: Indicates whether call fields are included in the response.

per_page.description: Number of records returned per page.

count.description: Number of records returned in the current page.

more_records.description: Indicates whether more records are available for retrieval.

email.description: Indicates whether email-related fields are included in the response.

sort_by.description: Field name used to sort the records.

sort_order.description: Sort order applied to the results (ascending or descending).

next_page_token.description: Token used to fetch the next page of results.

previous_page_token.description: Token used to fetch the previous page of results.

page_token_expiry.description: Timestamp indicating when the page tokens will expire.

RecordGETErrorResponse.description: Error response schema returned when GET record or GET records operations fail due to validation, pagination, or processing errors.

data.description: List of error objects describing failures encountered while processing GET record(s) requests.

items.description: Error object representing a single GET record(s) operation failure.

code.description: Machine-readable error code indicating the specific reason for the GET operation failure.

message.description: Human-readable description explaining why the GET operation failed.

details.description: Additional metadata providing context about the error.

resource_path_index.description: Index of the resource path segment where the error occurred.

status.description: Overall execution status of the GET request.
